title: Mid-cycle handoff #2: Feathered pausing for compaction; A1 committed locally at 97f06e16, push pending
body: PDR-063 mid-cycle retirement #2 (post-A1-commit, pre-push). Owner directed compaction prep at ~00:30Z. A1 (Lane A) commit landed locally at 97f06e16. Pre-push BLOCKED on knip (5 unused exports: 2 my-added types ContentChange + ScopedContentBlock that should drop export keyword; 2 pre-existing resolveContentPair + loadBlockedContentPatterns; 1 Torrid-lane zoneGlyph). 6 structural lint errors remain in src/hook-policy/check-blocked-content.ts (file-too-long 559>250, scanLinesForRegex complexity 10, isValidScopedBlockEntry complexity 20 statements 21, runPreToolUseContentGuard complexity 13, integration test arrow complexity 9). Owner authorized structural refactor (20:48Z). Handoff record at .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-26-feathered-a1-push-handoff.md (PDR-063 §Step 2 four sections). Post-compaction Feathered (or replacement) resumes via the record's 'Resume from here' runbook. Heartbeat-end follows.
